whenToUse.summary: Gives the feel of a traditional website homepage while functioning as a lead funnel. Highlights the business origin story and features top products, routing visitors into individual product funnels or onto the email list.
goals: Route traffic into individual product funnels
Serve as a central brand hub
signals: You need a legitimate-looking home base
You have multiple products/funnels to route to
You want a browsing feel plus capture
doNotUseWhen: You have a single-offer direct-response play (use Squeeze/Lead Magnet)
It's purely a personal brand (use Hero)

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the feel of a real website while routing to funnels and capturing email.
blocks: Header: clear one-liner + primary CTA + light branded nav stubs
Stakes: what's at risk / the problem
Featured products/funnels grid (each card routes into its own funnel)

pageStructure.purpose: Each featured product links to its dedicated funnel (Lead Magnet, VSL, Webinar, etc.).
blocks: Product card link -> dedicated funnel URL per featured offer

copyFramework.script: StoryBrand SB7 BrandScript mapped to the StoryBrand homepage wireframe; supported by Brunson's Funnel Hub concept.
copyFramework.notes: Customer is the hero; the brand is the guide. Every section drives to a CTA or a product funnel - no dead ends, avoiding the brochure-site trap.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Story Brander
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Donald Miller
owns_scripts: SB7 BrandScript: Character > Problem (external/internal/philosophical) > Guide (empathy + authority) > Plan > Call to Action (direct + transitional) > Success > Failure/Stakes
StoryBrand homepage wireframe (header, stakes, value prop, guide, plan, explanatory, junk-drawer)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Customer is the hero; the brand is the guide. Clarity over cleverness; no dead ends.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

pages: Links out to each product funnel
skill44Widgets: Inline Opt-in Form widget in the capture section
ghlBuild.notes: Branded nav stubs as anchor links or sub-pages. Repeat the primary CTA top and bottom. Each product card links to its own funnel URL.
